input_text: Guidance for safe transportation of blood components
NL_requirements: The activity 'pack components' must be executed by 'medicalStaff'.
The activity 'inspect components' must occur before 'pack components'.
The activity 'label components' must occur before 'transport components'.
The activity 'transport components' must be executed by 'courier'.
The system must send 'dispatchNotification' during 'dispatch components'.
If 'temperature' is greater than 10, the activity 'accept components' must not occur.
The maximum time between 'start transport' and 'end transport' is 86400 seconds.
The activity 'verify integrity' must occur before 'store components'.
If the system fails to 'transport components', it must 'notify lab'.
The activity 'transport components' eventually follows when 'status' is equal to 'validated'.
